flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Stanly Community College fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (82.6% → 63.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Stanly Community College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6k → 1.5k).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Stanly Community College are 10% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($36.7k vs $33.4k).
